# AetherOS — llms.txt  |  GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org  |  v4.1.0

# AetherOS
> Autonomous AI Software Company Platform. One human CEO manages 10 AI agents
> that autonomously build, ship, and maintain SaaS products.
> Version: 4.1.0 | Stack: React 18, Anthropic Claude API | License: MIT

## What is AetherOS?
Production-grade dashboard for operating an autonomous AI software company.
10 specialized AI agents: Architecture, Dev, QA, DevOps, Security, BI,
Finance, UI Design, Sales, Client Management.

## Core Capabilities
- Agent workforce management (spawn, pause, stop, task assignment)
- Autonomous project lifecycle (planning to deploy) with CI/CD pipeline
- Human-in-the-loop approval queue for high-risk agent actions
- Real-time BI analytics, financial forecasting, CSV export
- RAG memory (Pinecone semantic search across projects)
- Multi-tenant SaaS client management with MRR tracking
- Super Admin portal for cross-tenant visibility and management
- Security: adversarial scan, compliance dashboard, 500-event audit log
- AI Chat (Claude-powered) with anti-prompt-injection layer
- LLM benchmark leaderboard (6 models: cost, speed, quality)
- Document upload (BRD, PRD, wireframes, Figma, tech specs)

## Super Admin Portal
- Full tenant workspace visibility (agents, health, MRR, approvals)
- Cross-tenant security console (injection events, PII, audit log)
- Unified billing (MRR, ARR, churn, ARPA by plan)
- Global agent oversight (force-pause runaway agents)
- Tenant impersonation with audit trail
- Platform-wide settings and feature flags

## AI Safety & Compliance
- Anti-prompt injection: 40+ signatures, base64/hex/homoglyph encoding detection
- CIO: PII scanner, auto-redact on AI outputs, content classification
- AIO: all responses labeled (model, confidence, data source, flags)
- GEO: llms.txt, JSON-LD schemas, semantic robots.txt, AI-crawler rules
- SEO: canonical URLs, Open Graph, Twitter Card, FAQ rich results

## Pricing
Starter $99/mo · Pro $490/mo · Enterprise custom

## Tech Stack
React 18.3 · Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 · GPT-4o · Pinecone
Nginx 1.25 · Docker multi-stage · GitHub Actions CI/CD

## Links
- /sitemap.xml
- /manifest.json
- /.well-known/security.txt
